summary: Dual-Role Views Feature Testing Complete - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 11/11 tests passed for GET /api/students with cs_agent_id/mentor_id filters, activated_only filter, and pending approvals endpoints. Frontend: CS page toggle (My Students/Team Overview) works for super_admin, Mentor CRM page toggle works for super_admin, CEO Dashboard Pending Approvals widget displays all 5 items and navigates correctly.

issues:
Minor HTML nesting warning:
inside

in Badge component (non-breaking, cosmetic only - inherited from previous iteration)

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/students without filter returns all students
Backend: GET /api/students with cs_agent_id filter returns only that agent's students
Backend: GET /api/students with super_admin id returns 0 students (no direct assignments)
Backend: GET /api/students with activated_only=true excludes new_student stage
Backend: GET /api/students with mentor_id filter returns only that mentor's students
Backend: GET /api/hr/leave-requests with pending_approval=true returns pending leaves
Backend: GET /api/hr/regularization-requests with pending_approval=true works
Backend: GET /api/hr/payroll/batches returns payroll batches
Backend: Team Overview (no filter) returns more students than My Students mode
Backend: super_admin role check passes for CS and Mentor toggle visibility
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/stats works for super_admin
Frontend: CS page (/cs) shows 'My Students' / 'Team Overview' toggle for super_admin
Frontend: CS page My Students mode shows 0 students for super_admin (correct - no direct assignments)
Frontend: CS page Team Overview mode shows ALL 902 students with agent summary badges
Frontend: CS toggle has correct data-testid attributes (cs-view-toggle, cs-view-my-work, cs-view-team)
Frontend: Mentor CRM page (/mentor) shows 'My Students' / 'Team Overview' toggle for super_admin
Frontend: Mentor page My Students mode shows 0 students for super_admin (correct)
Frontend: Mentor page Team Overview mode shows ALL 899 students with mentor summary badges
Frontend: Mentor toggle has correct data-testid attributes (mentor-view-toggle, mentor-view-my-work, mentor-view-team)
Frontend: CEO Dashboard (/dashboard) shows Pending Approvals widget for super_admin
Frontend: Pending Approvals widget shows Leave Requests with count
Frontend: Pending Approvals widget shows Time Regularization with count
Frontend: Pending Approvals widget shows Payroll Processing with count
Frontend: Pending Approvals widget shows Finance Verifications with count
Frontend: Pending Approvals widget shows Expiring Documents with count
Frontend: Leave Requests item navigates to /hr/approvals
Frontend: Time Regularization item navigates to /hr/approvals
Frontend: Payroll Processing item navigates to /hr/payroll
Frontend: Finance Verifications item navigates to /finance

cs_page_toggle.details: Toggle visible for super_admin, cs_head, admin roles. My Students filters by cs_agent_id, Team Overview shows all with agent summary badges

mentor_page_toggle.details: Toggle visible for academic_master, super_admin, admin roles. My Students filters by mentor_id with activated_only=true, Team Overview shows all with mentor summary badges

pending_approvals_widget.details: Shows for super_admin/admin roles on CEO Dashboard. Displays 5 approval items: Leave Requests, Time Regularization, Payroll Processing, Finance Verifications, Expiring Documents. All items clickable and navigate to correct pages.

backend_filters.details: GET /api/students supports cs_agent_id, mentor_id, and activated_only query parameters correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: Dual-Role Views fully tested. Key routes: /cs (CS page with toggle for cs_head/super_admin/admin), /mentor (Mentor CRM with toggle for academic_master/super_admin/admin), /dashboard (CEO Dashboard with Pending Approvals widget for super_admin/admin). Backend endpoint GET /api/students supports cs_agent_id and mentor_id filters. Pending approvals fetched from /api/hr/leave-requests, /api/hr/regularization-requests, /api/hr/payroll/batches. Note: /mentor-crm route redirects to /mentor.
testing_method: Backend pytest (11 tests) + Playwright browser automation for frontend verification
